scope: inactive body_parts_v2 dataset export, fine-tune sampling, holdouts, metrics, and promotion refusal

supervision.v1: 56-class pretraining only; IDs 56-64 receive no inferred negative labels
supervision.v2: 65-class fine-tune only after the shared full body_parts_v2 human-review eligibility gate passes

export.repair: separate v2 ambiguity masks are now burned to ignore instead of relying on an impossible ambiguous class ID in the authoritative map
export.fixture: IDs 56..64 exported exactly while one independently masked ambiguous pixel becomes 255

config_contract.class_weighting: inverse sqrt pixel frequency capped at x8
config_contract.augmentations: ontology-aware horizontal flip, rare anatomy crop, bounded color jitter, nearest-label rotation with 255 border

metrics: per-class clothed false-positive image and pixel rates
left/right swap rate for every sided addition
promotion_refusal: all nine classes must be present exactly once
each class needs at least 50 clear positive inventory instances
each class needs measured positive and clothed-negative holdouts
all required per-class metrics must be finite
any clothed false positive fails closed until a real calibration authorizes a different threshold

verification.ruff: pass on src, tests, and tools
verification.black: 332 live-root and 323 clean-publish files format-clean with exact Black 26.5.1

open_real_evidence_gates: Reach 50-100 clear positive instances per new class
Run a real immutable v2 dataset and 65-class challenger
Publish real holdout IoU, boundary-F, recall, clothed false positives, and side-swap rates
Pass the separate real adult calibration and routing gates
